feedback.text: PLEASE LET THE GAMES BE AS THEY ARE. Stop with the "dictatorship" rules where YOU (governments), are in control of EVERYTHING. Games are not just games, but also part of CULTURE. We, the people, pay for these games not just to "play something", but also for the story, the good times with friends and some of us use it to "escape reality". I come home from work, I would like to enjoy my time by playing a game (single player or not). If you guys would spend all that energy destroying cheat engines in games instead, the world would be a better place. Instead you want to delete the old games and force us to play the shitty new buggy stuff "AAA" studios release after only half working on it. Games have never been this expensive and now the game is not even mine??? PLEASE MAN. These new game developers only think about how much more money they can squeeze out of 12 year olds with mommy's credit card by implementing Nicky Minaj skins, because she has a fat ass. Old games used to be about fun and skill. New games are about porn like content and THIS HAS TO STOP. And now the EU's dictators want to delete the only decent games left on the internet. Absolutely disgusting. Long live emulators and piracy, because that's our defense against this BS. If I pay for something and it aint even mine, WHY WOULD I PAY FOR IT IN THE FIRST PLACE??? Can't wait to have to watch 2 ads to be able to start my car in the morning :D . If I can still call it my car in 10 years... Im begging for Von Der Leyen to be removed from the commission and for this western dictatorship to be dismantled. FREE THE EU!!!!
